results.name: What is software development?
results.description: Software development refers to a set of computer science activities dedicated to the process of creating, designing, deploying and supporting software.

results.name: Software Development
results.description: Software development is defined as the process of designing, creating, testing, and maintaining computer programs and applications. This software development roadmap is best suited for students as well as software development enthusiasts. results.name: What Does a Software Developer Do? (And How to Become One)
results.description: Learn about software development careers and how to start yours with expert tips, recommendations, online courses, and more.
